impl.context: Build a Vue 3 movie-comments web app with an Ant Design Vue interface, a GraphQL API at /graphql, and SQLite persistence in ./test.db. The browser UI must show movie cards with poster images and metadata, let users select a movie, and let them post comments that appear immediately in the selected movie detail. Use Vue and ant-design-vue as real package dependencies, not CDN globals. Keep poster images local or data-URL based so the app does not depend on external network access. Use Node's built-in node:sqlite support for persistence when available, and avoid native SQLite addons such as better-sqlite3 or sqlite3 npm packages.
